message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.9 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", default-features =
  false, features = ["test-internals"] }` → `{ version = "0.3.0",
  default-features = false, features = ["test-internals"] }` at
  [workspace.dependencies]. All sqlmodel-* subcrates consume it via
  `asupersync = { workspace = true }`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`.
